titleStmt.title: SII 18.290: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 290. (B.K. No. 2 of 1933-34.) BANKĀPUR, BANKAPUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab lying in front of the Government Farm Office.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Māhāmaṇḍalēśvara Kīrtidēva is dated in the 2nd regnal year of Niśśaṁkamalla Saṁkamadēva, Viḷambi, Ās11hāḍha śu. As11hṭami, Monday, Saṁkrānti. The date is irregular. But for the week-day the details correspond to A.D. 1178, June 24. The week-day however was Saturday and not Monday as stated in the record.

It registers the gift of the village Gāvuṇḍavaḷḷi in P�uāṁgal Five-hundred, as sthaḷa-vṛitti to Vimaḷa[s11akti] of the Kāḷāmukha lineage. The gift was made by the king for the worship and the feeding of ascetics, education and other charitable purposes, in the temple of Nagarēśvaradēva. The donee is highly praised.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
maracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhaṁ mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁ
śabdamahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ banavāsīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ kha
prasādaṁ mrigamadāmōdaṁ tryakṣakṣmāsaṁbhavaṁ catu
dhiṣṭhitalalāṭalōcanacaturbbhuja jagadviditāṣṭādaśāśvamēdhayajñadīkṣā
dugirīṁdraruṁdraśikhariśikharasaṁsthāpitasphaṭikaśiḷāstaṁbhabaddhamadagajamahā
ṁkādaṁbacakri mayūravarmma(ṁ)mahāmahīpāḷakuḷabhūṣaṇaṁ permmaṭṭitūryya
carēṁdradhvajavirājamānamānōttuṁgasiṁhalāṁcchanaṁ dattārtthakāṁcanaṁ samara
kadaṁbarābharaṇaṁ mārkkoḷuvaragaṁḍaṁ pracaṁḍamārttaṇḍaṁ bhujabaḷabhīma satya
hāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ kīrttidēvarasaru sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyutta
ḷāṁbarōjvaḷaruciḥ saṁpūrṇnacaṁdraḥsvayaṁ śrīśākhācaravāyusū
nadvajaḥ śrīkaṁṭhīravalāṁcchanōpyaharahaṁ saṁrājatē bhūtaḷē śrībhāḷēkṣaṇa hēma
ttamaḥ . Asadaḷamāgi perccidarisēneyanikki nijapratāpadiṁ sasidharamūrttikīrtti
dharmmamārggadiṁ visasanadōhaḷaṁ vijayakāminiyaṁtaravāridhāreyi
ḷadanāgrahadiṁdu bhūmisaṁyutaṁ . turagamanēṟe khaḍgalate taṁnoḷoḍaṁbaḍe kīrtti
ri targgidaḍe perbbuliya bhairavaṁ paradaḍe naṁjaneṁjalisidaṁdadinōvade koṁdu kū
rttiyeṁdu dhare baṇnise jagadobbagaṁḍana . kāḷaladēviyaṁ varatanūdariyaṁ sujanaikava
triyaṁ kaṭiḷakuṁtaḷa bhūpāḷaka rājyasaṁbhava jayāvaheyaṁ dhare
kēḷele bhaṇnikaṁ budhanidhāna tākṣiya . va . Antanantamahimāspadanappa śrīmatu kīrttidēvara
ṁkāpurada śrīnagarēśvaradēvara vicitrakūṭaprāsādada māṭamumaṁ nānā prakārada naivēdyamumaṁ śiṣṭa
nātharigikkuvavārisatramumanalliyācāryyara tapaprabhāvamumaṁ kēḷdu paramaprītiyiṁ baṁ
tahriṣṭanuṁ dharmmaniṣṭhanuṁ santuṣṭacittanumāgi . mattamāpaṭṭaṇada mahimōnnatiyeṁteṁdaḍe . kaṁ . dāna
mānōṁnativettu niṁda baṁkāpuradoḷu nānāvinōdadiṁdaṁ tānippudu sukhadinakhiḷajananiku
ddēvādhidēvaṁ tridaśaparivritaṁ prītiyiṁdippatāṇaṁ dhīmānāditya nityaṁ samudipaniḷayaṁ mēṇu
hēmābhaṁ mēruśaiḷaṁ suraniḷayamidaṁ mēṇu mūlōkapuṇyaṁ sāmyaṁgoṁḍaṁtirettaṁ ne
layaṁ lōkapūjyaṁ . Alliyācāryyara tapaprabhāvamenteṁdaḍe . v® . Ātatakīrttiyaṁ vimaḷaśaktiyani
ktiyaṁ sātvikadānanaṁ manucaritrana nirjjitapuṟpacāpanaṁ nītivicāranaṁ munikaḷāpana nirmmitadēvagē
taḷavaṁdyanaṁ maruḷe bēḍavo jaṁgamapārijātanaṁ . viracipanartthiyiṁ suragrihāvaḷiyaṁ vividhaprakāradi
patraka virājitamāgiraleṁtu nōrppaḍaṁ parahitacittaṁ vimaḷaśaktiyatīśvara neṁdu līleyiṁ parasu
manōrathasiddhiyanāvakālamuṁ . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhānajapasamādhi
saṁpaṁnnaruṁ yāhārābhayabhaiśajyaśāstrapradānōdyuktacittaruṁ vicitra citrakūṭa prāsa da
vaḷinirmmāṇanipuṇapaṭu siddhasūtradhuraruṁ kāḷāmukha kuḷakumudinīpūrṇnacaṁdraruṁ
ṇasmaraṇapariṇatānaḥkaraṇaruṁ kuḷāgamasarōjinīvirājita rājahaṁsaruṁ datā rtthikāṁcanaruṁ
śiṣṭasaṁtarppitāṁnadā nagarēśvaradēvalabdhavara prasādaruṁ ṣaḍakṣaravaṁtrasiddharuṁ kā
ya nidarśigaḷamappa śrīvimaḷaśa kālaṁ karcci dha rāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi śīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ kī
ru kaḷacuryyacaka vartti niśśaṁkamalla saṁkamadēvavarṣada 2 ḍeneya viḷaṁbisaṁvatsaradāṣāḍha śuddhāṣṭami sōma
pāta saṁkrāṁtiyaṁdu śrīmadrājadhānipaṭṭaṇaṁ baṁkāpura śrīnaga rēśvaradēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ raṁgabhō
takūṭaprāsādadamāṭakkaṁ tapōdhanarāhāradānakkaṁ vidyādānakkaṁ dīnā nātharigikkuvavārisatrakkaṁ
nuṁgallayinūṟaṟa kaṁpaṇa mūvattaṟa baḷiya bāḍaṁ gāvuṁḍavaḷḷiyaṁ sthaḷavrittiyeṁdu pa
riha�ṁ māḍi biṭṭaradaṟa catura ghāṭamanteṁdaḍe .The inscription stops here abruptly.
Digital edition of SII 18.290 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
